title: Invest in your creative process
subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when the product proves its value to you.
footer: No credit card for trial · Cancel anytime · Prices in USD

trial.q: Do I need a credit card for the trial?
trial.a: No. The 14-day trial is completely free and requires no payment method.

cancel.a: Yes. You can cancel from your profile at any time. No penalties, no questions asked.

currency.a: All prices are in US dollars (USD). Stripe automatically converts based on your country.

team.a: Team plans are on the roadmap. For now the Creator plan is individual. Contact us if you're interested in early access.
